do_not_merge.reason: Different base route IDs (S53 vs S93) are strong identity fields that differ. Per Contradiction test (test 1), records with differing strong identity fields (route_id) are distinct objects and must not merge.

suggestion.rationale: The two records have different route_id values (S53 and S93), each with service_variant local. The identity canon for routes defines identity as base route id + service variant; distinct base ids mean distinct real-world objects. The candidate edge's shared_base_route signal is erroneous (S93 is not a variant of S53). No merge is possible.
